overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring the interior of a spaceship or space station. The character walks through industrial corridors, passes through a storage room, and enters a living quarters area containing an NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial spaceship corridor with exposed piping

events.description: character turns left into side corridor junction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the airlock door

entered.detail: large metal airlock door with illuminated frame at end of corridor
network of industrial pipes and conduits running along ceiling
corrugated metal wall panels with industrial aesthetic
tall metal storage locker against left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with exposed piping on the ceiling and metal walls. An airlock door is visible at the far end, and the floor consists of metal grating. The character turns left at a junction near the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: secondary corridor connecting to storage room

events.description: enters small storage room with stone walls and cardboard boxes

agents.ego_description: proceeding through secondary corridor and entering the storage area

entered.detail: rectangular framed picture hanging on corridor wall
rough stone masonry walls in storage area
stack of cardboard boxes in corner of storage room

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a secondary corridor featuring framed artwork on the walls, then transitions into a small storage room with stone block walls and cardboard boxes. The industrial metal walls of the previous corridor remain visible in the background before the character exits the storage area.

scene_state.functional_zone: personal living quarters with office furniture

events.description: enters main living quarters from storage room doorway

agents.ego_description: walking into the living quarters and approaching the NPC standing near the shelving unit

notable_agents.action: standing still near shelving unit facing the wall

entered.detail: wooden desk with computer terminal and various items
green swivel office chair on wheels
tall metal shelving unit against back wall
polished wooden floor panels throughout the room
desktop computer setup on the office desk

segments.scene_description: The character enters a well-lit living quarters with wooden flooring, featuring an office desk with a computer terminal on the left and a metal shelving unit on the right. An NPC in a white shirt stands near the back wall facing the shelves as the character approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cold, industrial corridor into a warm, inhabited living space. It begins by following a character through a narrow hallway of metal walls and exposed ceiling piping, moving across grated flooring toward a distant airlock before turning left at a junction. As the character proceeds, the environment shifts from industrial metal to a secondary corridor adorned with framed artwork, leading directly into a small storage room enclosed by stone block walls and filled with cardboard boxes. The scene then opens from the cramped storage area into a well-lit living quarters featuring wooden flooring and an office desk with a computer terminal. Finally, the camera approaches a metal shelving unit where an NPC in a white shirt stands facing the wall.
